title: [kimi-review] 9f25f75: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix does not exist.** The com
description:
Commit: 9f25f7556
Message: fix(oscore): reject both-empty sender/recipient IDs in ctx_create

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix does not exist.** The commit message and issue closure claim `oscore_ctx_create` now rejects both-empty sender/recipient IDs (a real cryptographic concern — identical key derivation per RFC 8613 §3.2). However, the diff contains **no code changes whatsoever** — it only edits `.beads/issues/project-LICHEN-kueh.json`, an issue-tracker metadata file. The vulnerability is presumably still present in the source, while the tracking issue is now marked closed.
